rfc3161_tsa.verification: openssl ts -verify: OK — messageImprint == commitment_digest AND chains to DigiCert Trusted Root G4
rfc3161_tsa.note: REAL RFC-3161 token over the real commitment digest, offline-verified (imprint binding + full chain). Files: response.tsr, token.der, tsa-certs.pem, digicert-root-g4.crt, request.tsq. Accuracy is not in the token; a production verifier resolves it from the committed TSA policy or fails closed (raw 369).

opentimestamps.note: Real OTS stamp over ANCHOR_ME.txt (file content = the commitment digest hex). PendingAttestation on 4 calendars (a.pool/b.pool.opentimestamps, eternitywall, catallaxy). Bitcoin confirmation in ~hours; run `ots upgrade ANCHOR_ME.txt.ots` then flip verified + cross-check the block merkle root vs mempool.space (as done for 5J/5K). Proof: ANCHOR_ME.txt.ots.

non_claim: A real DigiCert RFC-3161 token establishes a real bounded-time upper bound over the commitment, offline-verifiable. `externally_anchored` is NOT yet banked: it additionally requires the OTS proof to be Bitcoin-CONFIRMED and the full vtc_quorum_confirmed ceremony re-run with this real token + confirmed checkpoint wired through the adapter's OpenSSL path. This record is the real capture; confirmation + adapter integration are the remaining steps.
